category_sources: source_facts.description says it is the command-line interface for Vercel; official Vercel CLI docs describe managing deployments, domains, logs, env vars, and projects.
display_name_sources: Official Vercel documentation page title is Vercel CLI; source_facts.name is vercel-cli.
docs_sources: Official Vercel docs provide the Vercel CLI overview and global options pages.
repo_sources: Official GitHub repository vercel/vercel is the Vercel monorepo and includes the CLI package; source archive is from npm because Homebrew packages the npm CLI.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies the Vercel CLI; official docs describe project deployment, DNS, domains, env, logs, and CI/CD usage.
